chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 228 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 9997/2025. 12.12.2025. Mr. Mir Muhammad Nohri, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Sajid Ali Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State alongwith Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Abdul Jabbar PS Makki Shah. = Counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant no longer wishes to press this restoration application as they have compromised out of the Court however, the counsel for respondents submits that he is not aware of such compromise. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application was dismissed for non- prosecution on 07.11.2025. Accordingly, the listed application for restoration is now dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Tufail
